sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; export default function Cart({ items, onRemove, onClose, onUpdateQty }) { const total = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.qty, 0); return ( <>

Your Cart

{items.length === 0 ? (
🛒

Your cart is empty

) : ( <>
    {items.map(item => (

  • {item.name}

    ₹{item.price.toLocaleString('en-IN')}

    {item.qty}
    • ))}
Total ₹{total.toLocaleString('en-IN')}
)}
); }
